title: rubus tomentosus f. calabarensis
intro: Rubus tomentosus f. calabarensis, also known as the Nigerian raspberry or Calabar raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Africa, specifically in the tropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Rubus tomentosus f. calabarensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
